# Fade External

Windows x64 Roblox overlay (external). Product version **1.5.0**.

## Supported games
- Arsenal
- BloxStrike
- Counter Blox
- MiscGunTest:X (hitbox extender disabled — ban risk)
- Baseplate (sandbox)

## Build
Release | x64 → `FADE.exe` (`TargetName` in `External.vcxproj`)

## Config
`%USERPROFILE%\Documents\Fade\config.ini` (migrates from old Match-Ware folder once)

## Website / updates
- Site: https://kynport.vercel.app/
- Discord: https://discord.gg/3WsFqS9hTF
- Changelog: `/releases/external-changelog.json`
- Download: `/downloads/FADE.exe`
